nodes.label: AI as bridge between mental creativity and execution
nodes.label_negative: Inability to translate creative vision into tangible form

nodes.grounding_span: instead of creating just a coloring page, I can expand to create a passage with the coloring page

nodes.label: AI accessibility vs. impact on human artists
